tasks.label: TripNest Baseline Java 11
tasks.command: cmd.exe /c "cd /d d:\tripnest && set JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-11 && "C:\Program Files (x86)\apache-maven-3.9.14\bin\mvn.cmd" clean compile test-compile -q && "C:\Program Files (x86)\apache-maven-3.9.14\bin\mvn.cmd" clean test -q"

tasks.label: TripNest Baseline Java 11
tasks.command: cmd.exe /c "cd /d d:\tripnest && set \"JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-11\" && \"C:\Program Files (x86)\apache-maven-3.9.14\bin\mvn.cmd\" clean compile test-compile -q && \"C:\Program Files (x86)\apache-maven-3.9.14\bin\mvn.cmd\" clean test -q"

tasks.label: Test CMD Env
tasks.command: cmd.exe /c "set JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-11 && set JAVA_HOME && \"C:\Program Files (x86)\apache-maven-3.9.14\bin\mvn.cmd\" -version"

tasks.label: TripNest Baseline Java 11
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "& { $env:JAVA_HOME='C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-11'; Set-Location 'd:\tripnest'; & 'C:\Program Files (x86)\apache-maven-3.9.14\bin\mvn.cmd' clean compile test-compile -q; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; & 'C:\Program Files (x86)\apache-maven-3.9.14\bin\mvn.cmd' clean test -q; exit $LASTEXITCODE }"

tasks.label: TripNest Baseline Java 11 Run2
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "& { $env:JAVA_HOME='C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-11'; Set-Location 'd:\tripnest'; & 'C:\Program Files (x86)\apache-maven-3.9.14\bin\mvn.cmd' clean compile test-compile -q; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; & 'C:\Program Files (x86)\apache-maven-3.9.14\bin\mvn.cmd' clean test -q; exit $LASTEXITCODE }"

tasks.label: TripNest Baseline Java 11 Debug
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "& { $env:JAVA_HOME='C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-11'; Set-Location 'd:\tripnest'; & 'C:\Program Files (x86)\apache-maven-3.9.14\bin\mvn.cmd' -e clean compile test-compile; exit $LASTEXITCODE }"

tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "& { Set-Location 'd:\tripnest'; & 'C:\Program Files (x86)\apache-maven-3.9.14\bin\mvn.cmd' clean test-compile -q; exit $LASTEXITCODE }"

tasks.label: TripNest Java 21 Compile Check 2
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "& { Set-Location 'd:\tripnest'; & 'C:\Program Files (x86)\apache-maven-3.9.14\bin\mvn.cmd' clean test-compile -q; exit $LASTEXITCODE }"

tasks.label: TripNest Java 21 Compile Debug
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "& { Set-Location 'd:\tripnest'; & 'C:\Program Files (x86)\apache-maven-3.9.14\bin\mvn.cmd' -e clean test-compile; exit $LASTEXITCODE }"

tasks.label: TripNest Java 21 Compile Check Skip Enforcer
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "& { Set-Location 'd:\tripnest'; & 'C:\Program Files (x86)\apache-maven-3.9.14\bin\mvn.cmd' -Denforcer.skip=true clean test-compile -q; exit $LASTEXITCODE }"

tasks.label: TripNest Java 21 Compile Skip Enforcer Confirm
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "& { Set-Location 'd:\tripnest'; & 'C:\Program Files (x86)\apache-maven-3.9.14\bin\mvn.cmd' '-Denforcer.skip=true' 'clean' 'test-compile' '-q'; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { Write-Output 'COMPILE_OK' } else { Write-Output 'COMPILE_FAIL' }; exit $LASTEXITCODE }"

tasks.label: TripNest Java 21 Full Test Skip Enforcer
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "& { Set-Location 'd:\tripnest'; & 'C:\Program Files (x86)\apache-maven-3.9.14\bin\mvn.cmd' '-Denforcer.skip=true' 'clean' 'test' '-q'; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { Write-Output 'TEST_OK' } else { Write-Output 'TEST_FAIL' }; exit $LASTEXITCODE }"

tasks.label: TripNest Java 21 Full Test Skip Enforcer Retry
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "& { Set-Location 'd:\tripnest'; & 'C:\Program Files (x86)\apache-maven-3.9.14\bin\mvn.cmd' '-Denforcer.skip=true' 'clean' 'test' '-q'; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { Write-Output 'TEST_OK' } else { Write-Output 'TEST_FAIL' }; exit $LASTEXITCODE }"
